name: roots-mcp-server
description: Check cosmetic ingredient safety and multi-jurisdiction regulatory compliance — EU Regulation 1223/2009, US FDA, Korea MFDS, Japan MHLW, ASEAN, and 7 more — backed by 725,921 rows of SCCS opinions, NOAEL studies, and pre-calculated Margin of Safety values. The world's first and only cosmetic-regulatory MCP: query ingredients, screen formulas, and calculate MoS in real time at no cost. Equivalent data costs €16,000/year from commercial providers.
author: Shahar Ben-David <rootsbybenda@gmail.com> (https://rootsbybenda.com)
